title: Copy Number Variant (CNV) Plating
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs mastermix and DNA sample transfer to a custom 384-well plate. All DNA samples are transferred in quadruplicate in adjacent wells forming 2x2 well squares on the 384-well plate (12x8 squares mapping to the 12x8 input from the 96-well DNA plate), as in the following image: --- * MicroAmp Optical 384-well plate * USA Scientific 96 Well Plate 100 µL * Custom single-channel reservoir 25ml (will span slots 4 and 1) * [Opentrons P10 multi-channel GEN1 pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette?variant=5984202489885) * [Opentrons 10µl tiprack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-10ul-tips) ---
steps_raw: This protocol performs mastermix and DNA sample transfer to a custom 384-well plate. All DNA samples are transferred in quadruplicate in adjacent wells forming 2x2 well squares on the 384-well plate (12x8 squares mapping to the 12x8 input from the 96-well DNA plate), as in the following image: --- * MicroAmp Optical 384-well plate * USA Scientific 96 Well Plate 100 µL * Custom single-channel reservoir 25ml (will span slots 4 and 1) * [Opentrons P10 multi-channel GEN1 pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette?variant=5984202489885) * [Opentrons 10µl tiprack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-10ul-tips) ---
Input the mount side for your P10 multi-channel GEN1 pipette and the number of DNA samples to process (1-96, processed in columns of 8).
Upload your custom labware and protocol script into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
